framework.reasoning: Paper uses SAC, which is most naturally implemented in PyTorch (stable-baselines3, CleanRL, or custom). The authors do not specify a framework; PyTorch chosen for compatibility with most academic SAC implementations and to allow custom LSTM/Transformer encoders + Dirichlet policy heads. CUDA recommended due to ~14-23h per fold reported on NVIDIA L4.

tensor_flows.name: policy_forward
steps: Encode per-asset sequences with LSTM/Transformer -> (B, k, H)
Cross-sectional attention over assets, fuse with global -> (B, H_state)
Dirichlet head: state -> concentration alpha (B, k+1) via softplus
Compute log_prob for SAC entropy term

tensor_flows.name: env_step
steps: Compute portfolio return r_p = sum(w_i * R_i) + w_cash * 0
Apply transaction cost: r_p_net = r_p - 0.0002 * TO / 2
Advance one trading day; recompute features for next state

tensor_flows.name: sac_update
steps: Compute target Q: r + gamma * (min(Q1', Q2')(s', a') - alpha*log_pi(a'|s'))
Critic loss: MSE(Q_i(s,a), target) for i=1,2 — backprop, Adam lr=5e-4
Actor loss: E[alpha*log_pi(a|s) - min(Q1, Q2)(s, a)] — backprop, Adam lr=3e-4
Soft target update: theta_target = tau*theta + (1-tau)*theta_target, tau=0.005
Repeat for 2 gradient steps per env step

risk_assessment.description: Historical index membership requires Bloomberg Terminal (paywalled). Reproduction uses current membership as fallback, introducing survivorship bias that may inflate measured returns.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Document deviation in README; provide hook (data/membership/) to load user-supplied CSVs of historical constituents; warn loudly at runtime.

risk_assessment.description: Full reproduction is computationally expensive: ~14h LSTM / ~23h Transformer per fold × 16 folds × 5 configs × 3 markets ≈ 3,400+ GPU-hours on NVIDIA L4.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Provide --quick-test flag (1 fold, 2 epochs) for smoke testing; document that the notebook only runs a tiny synthetic-data demo.

risk_assessment.description: Equity-vs-cash split distribution for HierarchicalDirichletPolicy is not specified in the paper.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use Beta distribution as primary assumption (documented in ambiguities); expose `equity_split_dist` config flag with alternatives (dirichlet_2, sigmoid_deterministic).

risk_assessment.description: Critic network depth/width and exact attention variant (cross-sectional) are inferred from SAC defaults.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Expose `critic_hidden` and `attention_type` config flags; default to stable-baselines3 SAC defaults.

risk_assessment.description: Total training steps per fold and adaptive retraining annualization factor (252?) not explicitly given.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use 252 trading days/year annualization; expose `steps_per_epoch` and `annualization_factor` as config knobs.

risk_assessment.description: Technical indicator parameters (RSI window, MACD lookbacks, Bollinger σ) not specified.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use canonical defaults RSI(14), MACD(12,26,9), Bollinger(20, 2σ); document in code comments.
